title: Nia's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Little Nia experiences different emotions throughout her day, each represented by vibrant colors - from angry red when frustrated, to sad blue when lonely, to happy yellow when playing.

pages.text: This is Nia. Nia has many feelings. Her feelings have colors too!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing in a swirling rainbow background of soft pastel colors representing different emotions
illustration.alt: Nia surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Nia is angry, she feels RED. Red like fire. Red like hot soup. Mad, mad, mad!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with a frustrated expression surrounded by swirling angry red clouds and jagged red lightning bolts
illustration.alt: Angry Nia with red swirls around her

pages.text: When Nia is sad, she feels BLUE. Blue like rain. Blue like tears. Sad, sad, sad.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes looking downcast with gentle blue raindrops falling around her and soft blue clouds overhead
illustration.alt: Sad Nia with blue rain falling

pages.text: When Nia is happy, she feels YELLOW! Yellow like sunshine. Yellow like flowers. Happy, happy, happy!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes smiling brightly surrounded by golden yellow sunshine rays and cheerful yellow butterflies dancing around her

pages.text: Nia has red days. Nia has blue days. Nia has yellow days. All feelings are okay!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes in the center with three colored sections around her - red swirls on one side, blue rain on another, and yellow sunshine on the third
illustration.alt: Nia with all her colorful feelings

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color does Nia feel when she is angry?
questions.explanation: Nia feels red when she is angry, like fire and hot soup!

questions.question: What color does Nia feel when she is sad?
questions.explanation: Nia feels blue when she is sad, like rain and tears.

questions.question: What color does Nia feel when she is happy?
questions.explanation: Nia feels yellow when she is happy, like sunshine and flowers!
